fragments.content: Antipsychotics definition and mechanism content placeholder - detailed pharmacological information including mechanism of action, receptor targets, pharmacokinetic properties, and therapeutic indications based on FDA labeling and clinical evidence.

Antipsychotics treatment protocol content placeholder - dosing recommendations, titration schedules, indication-specific regimens, monitoring requirements, and dose adjustments for renal/hepatic impairment based on FDA prescribing information.

Antipsychotics diagnostic and monitoring criteria placeholder - contraindications, adverse effects profile, drug interactions, monitoring parameters, and special population considerations based on FDA labeling and post-marketing surveillance.
